tool.name: Validate and Classify rRNA Primers
tool.description: Validate primer matches against rRNA models and classify forward and reverse primers
tool.command: #set input_basename = str($cmsearch_input.name).rsplit('.',1)[0] primer_val_classification -i '$cmsearch_input' -f '$primers' -s '$input_basename' $se && mv '$input_basename'_primer_validation.tsv '$summary' && mv fwd_primers.fasta '$fwd_primers' && mv rev_primers.fasta '$rev_primers'

param.name: cmsearch_input
param.label: CMsearch deoverlapped tblout results
param.help: Output from Infernal cmsearch with overlaps removed

param.name: primers
param.label: Primer sequences
param.help: FASTA file containing concatenated primer sequences

tool.help:
**Validate and Classify rRNA Primers** --------------------------------------
This tool validates primer sequences against rRNA covariance model matches and classifies them as **forward** or **reverse** primers.
The tool:
* Reads primer alignment coordinates produced by **cmsearch** * Determines whether primers bind outside rRNA hypervariable regions * Assigns the targeted **variable region** (e.g. V3, V4) * Classifies primers by **strand orientation** * Outputs validated primer sequences
-----
@LICENSE@
